allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = list\(sys.stdin\) # Get ALL human messages to see full conversation flow for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): try: msg = json.loads\(line\) except: continue if msg.get\(''type''\) != ''human'': continue content = msg.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', []\) for block in content: text = '''' if isinstance\(block, str\): text = block elif isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = block.get\(''text'', ''''\) text = text.strip\(\) # Skip system reminders if text.startswith\(''<system-reminder>''\) or not text or text.startswith\(''Base directory''\): continue print\(f''LINE {i}: {text[:300]}''\) print\(\) ")
